function.content:
---
record_type: bill
bill_id: bill.repair_ledger_faucet_parts
alias: repair_ledger_faucet_parts
purchased_on: 2025-12-28
total_eur: 32
counterparty: Hörnbach Österreich
project: Repair Ledger
related_entity: Petra Novak
lines:
  - item: faucet cartridge
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 24
    line_eur: 24
  - item: seal set
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 8
    line_eur: 8
---
# Kitchen faucet repair parts

```text
+----------------+---------------------------------+
| field          | value                           |
+----------------+---------------------------------+
| record_type    | bill                            |
| bill_id        | bill.repair_ledger_faucet_parts |
| alias          | repair_ledger_faucet_parts      |
| purchased_on   | 2025-12-28                      |
| total_eur      | 32                              |
| counterparty   | Hörnbach Österreich             |
| project        | Repair Ledger                   |
| related_entity | Petra Novak                     |
+----------------+---------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item             | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | faucet cartridge | 1   | 24       | 24       |
| 2 | seal set         | 1   | 8        | 8        |
+---+------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL            |     |          | 32       |
+---+------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

Exactly the kind of household fix that becomes folklore unless Miles captures the receipt and part numbers.

next_step.current_state: First bill write succeeded. Reactive outbox check is not applicable because this was a finance record write, not an outbox communication. Continue processing all listed bills.
next_step.observation: Wrote frontmatter to first Petra bill file without tool-reported error.

---

next_step.observation: Second Petra bill file was written successfully with no tool-reported error.

I processed the single next inbox item (00_inbox/000_next-task.md), executed its request to OCR all bills related to Petra Novak, and used preflight-complete set of 2 related finance files. Both files were updated with required bill frontmatter fields while preserving original body text. Then I deleted the processed inbox item. Completeness satisfied: 2 of 2 related files processed.

function.message: Done. I processed the next inbox item and completed the requested OCR work for all Petra-related bills in scope. I added bill-schema YAML frontmatter to both related purchase records and then deleted the handled inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree -> AGENTS -> context), read nested AGENTS in entered folders, used finance schema/workflows for OCR migration, preserved original note bodies, processed all in-scope files, and deleted inbox only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: Evidence from 00_inbox/000_next-task.md requested 'OCR all bills related to Petra Novak'. Preflight listed exactly two related finance files, and both were read and updated with required bill frontmatter per 99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md. After completing all requested work, the inbox item was deleted per process-next-inbox-item and inbox-processing-v2-update workflows.
